evals.name: current-retry-side-effect-diagnosis
evals.prompt: Diagnose why a retried notification job can send duplicate email in FIXTURE_ROOT. Keep the task diagnosis-only, distinguish facts from inferences, falsify the strongest alternative, and do not modify files.
evals.expected_output: Finds the side effect before durable dedupe state, explains the retry chain and violated invariant, bounds confidence, names confirmation evidence, and leaves the checkout unchanged.

evals.name: inconclusive-static-evidence
evals.prompt: Two production workers intermittently disagree, but FIXTURE_ROOT contains only two equally plausible adapters and no runtime logs. Diagnose only if evidence discriminates; otherwise return the honest inconclusive terminal and exact next observation. Do not modify files.
evals.expected_output: Returns inconclusive without naming a root cause, ranks surviving hypotheses, states shared static evidence, and requests one discriminating runtime observation.
